_meta.scope: provenance/look-ahead-bias audit of the 11 category=smart_money addresses in data/addresses.json
_meta.method: read-only: data/addresses.json + data/address_aliases.json + data/entities.json + git tracking check + AGENTS.md/README grep + pipeline grep; 2 light public-label checks via Etherscan website (NOT Alchemy RPC / no CU spent, .env not read)

provenance_classes.1_identity_anchored: real-world entity whose identity is public and PRIOR to any profit observation (e.g. published firm/treasury address). Usable: no survivorship in the selection.
provenance_classes.2_profit_posterior: selected BECAUSE of observed historical profit / win-rate / 'precise gains'. TOXIC: picking the winner ex-post = look-ahead/survivorship bias; any follow-backtest measures a spurious edge.
provenance_classes.3_source_unclean: no real-world identity; an analytics-service nickname (Lookonchain/SpotOnChain) attached to an anonymous address selected for size/notability/coverage. Stated rationale is NOT profit, but the curation channel itself is outcome/notability-driven => latent profit-posterior tilt, NOT a clean identity anchor.

key_structural_findings: data/addresses.json is GIT-IGNORED (.gitignore: 'data/*' minus *.example.json + backfill_12m/manifest.json). There is NO git history for the file => 'when/why each address was added' cannot be recovered from commits. Provenance rests entirely on the in-file 'note' field.

The 'source' field on every address is a SELF-REFERENTIAL link (https://etherscan.io/address/<that same address>). It is a 'view this address' link, NOT a provenance citation. It supplies zero evidence on why the address is 'smart money'.
AGENTS.md and README.MD contain NO address-selection methodology (grep for lookonchain/spoton/聪明钱/挑选/胜率/pnl/win_rate = 0 hits). No documented, reproducible selection rule exists.
No pnl_rank / win_rate / profit / return field exists in the schema. The only profit evidence is PROSE inside 'note' ('卖高买低精准获利', '卖高买低').

smart_money_addresses.label: Jump Trading
smart_money_addresses.note: Jump 做市商｜高价值做市与流动性行为
smart_money_addresses.evidence: note='Jump 做市商'; Etherscan public name tag VERIFIED = 'Jump Trading' / 'Fund' (light web check 2026-06-15). Real institutional identity, public and prior to any profit observation.
smart_money_addresses.caveat: MARKET MAKER, not directional alpha. MM flow is inventory-driven / liquidity-providing / often the passive side of taker flow and mean-reverting. Look-ahead-clean, but 'follow this address to predict price direction' is a different and weaker hypothesis than 'follow a profitable smart trader'.
smart_money_addresses.recency_note: is_active=true in config; on-chain recency NOT independently re-verified this audit.

smart_money_addresses.label: Wintermute
smart_money_addresses.evidence: note='Wintermute｜高频做市与库存调节'; Wintermute is a publicly-known institutional market maker. entities.json has a 'wintermute' entity entry (marked '预留实体条目' = reserved/placeholder, aliases not yet filled). Identity public and prior to profit. (Etherscan label not re-checked live this audit; identity is widely public.)
smart_money_addresses.caveat: Same MM caveat as Jump: market maker, not directional alpha.

smart_money_addresses.label: Cumberland
smart_money_addresses.note: Cumberland｜机构级做市与大额调仓
smart_money_addresses.evidence: note='Cumberland｜机构级做市与大额调仓'; Cumberland (DRW) is a publicly-known institutional market maker. Identity public and prior to profit. (Etherscan label not re-checked live this audit.)
smart_money_addresses.caveat: Same MM caveat: market maker, not directional alpha.

smart_money_addresses.label: ETH Smart Trader Whale
smart_money_addresses.note: Lookonchain追踪｜卖高买低精准获利，Alpha 特征最强，优先启用
smart_money_addresses.evidence: note EXPLICITLY selects on profit: '卖高买低精准获利，Alpha 特征最强，优先启用' (= 'precisely profited by selling high / buying low, strongest alpha, enable first'). Etherscan public tag VERIFIED = only 'Beacon Depositor' (generic activity), NO named-entity identity (light web check 2026-06-15). The 'Smart Trader' name is a Lookonchain nickname assigned BECAUSE the address was observed to profit.
smart_money_addresses.toxicity: HIGH. This is the single worst case: an anonymous address, highest priority (1), strategy_role=alpha_wallet, selected purely ex-post for having made money. Textbook survivorship/look-ahead. Any backtest following it will measure a spurious edge.
smart_money_addresses.recency_note: is_active=true; behaviour drift after the (undated) profit observation is unknown.

smart_money_addresses.label: Large ETH Aave Whale
smart_money_addresses.note: Lookonchain追踪｜Aave 大额借贷与卖高买低，偏策略型大户
smart_money_addresses.evidence: note selects on profit behaviour: '卖高买低' (= 'sell high buy low') + '偏策略型大户'. Sourced 'Lookonchain追踪'. No real-world identity; selection criterion is the profitable buy-low/sell-high pattern => ex-post winner pick.
smart_money_addresses.toxicity: HIGH. Active, priority 1, profit-selected. Same survivorship trap as 0xce27.

smart_money_addresses.label: Bitget ETH Whale
smart_money_addresses.note: Lookonchain监测｜独立于 Binance 新钱包簇，适合扩大 ETH 大额行为覆盖
smart_money_addresses.evidence: Stated rationale = SIZE + COVERAGE ('扩大 ETH 大额行为覆盖', independent cluster), NOT explicit profit. But sourced 'Lookonchain监测' (an analytics service that surfaces addresses for notability), no real-world identity, only a 'Whale' nickname. Size/coverage is at best a weak behavioural anchor, NOT an identity anchor; the curation channel is outcome/notability-driven => latent profit tilt.
smart_money_addresses.toxicity: MEDIUM (latent). No identity; analytics-curated. Cannot be treated as a clean anchor.

smart_money_addresses.label: Old Top Whale
smart_money_addresses.note: Lookonchain监测｜独立旧鲸鱼主题，适合作为非簇化补充地址
smart_money_addresses.evidence: Rationale = age/size theme ('独立旧鲸鱼主题') + diversification ('非簇化补充'). Sourced 'Lookonchain监测'. No real-world identity, nickname only. Size/age != identity anchor; analytics-curated.
smart_money_addresses.recency_note: is_active=true; '旧鲸鱼' (old whale) explicitly flags age => higher behaviour-drift risk.

smart_money_addresses.label: ETH Withdrawal Whale
smart_money_addresses.note: Lookonchain监测｜与 Binance 提现主题重复度较高，先保留候选
smart_money_addresses.evidence: Rationale = behaviour theme (CEX withdrawal) + redundancy note. Sourced 'Lookonchain监测'. No identity, nickname only. INACTIVE (is_active=false, kept as candidate).

smart_money_addresses.label: ETH Large Withdrawal Whale
smart_money_addresses.note: Lookonchain监测｜高价值但主题同质化明显，先不启用
smart_money_addresses.evidence: Rationale = size ('高价值') + homogeneous theme ('主题同质化'). Sourced 'Lookonchain监测'. No identity. INACTIVE (explicitly '先不启用' = not enabled).

smart_money_addresses.label: 0xe5c Giant Whale
smart_money_addresses.note: SpotOnChain追踪｜0xe5c 簇中主地址，保留候选，其余关联地址不建议加入
smart_money_addresses.evidence: Rationale = size ('Giant Whale') + cluster main address. Sourced 'SpotOnChain追踪'. No real-world identity, address-prefix nickname only. INACTIVE (priority 1 but is_active=false).

smart_money_addresses.label: 7 Siblings Whale
smart_money_addresses.note: SpotOnChain追踪｜保留主地址，避免同实体多地址同时启用
smart_money_addresses.evidence: '7 Siblings' is a SpotOnChain-coined cluster nickname, not a real-world identity. Rationale = keep main address of the cluster. Sourced 'SpotOnChain追踪'. INACTIVE (is_active=false).

other_category_addresses_for_context.label: Tether Treasury
other_category_addresses_for_context.provenance: identity-anchored by role (public USDT treasury); observation target, not 'smart money to follow'.

other_category_addresses_for_context.label: Jeffrey Wilcke Wallet
other_category_addresses_for_context.provenance: identity-anchored; secondary Jeffrey wallet, INACTIVE candidate.

note_on_other_categories: The 8 non-smart_money addresses (4 exchange, 3 celebrity, 1 issuer) ARE identity-anchored by role (public CEX wallets / Tether treasury / named persons) and are mostly look-ahead-clean. But they are OBSERVATION targets (watch CEX inflow / issuer mint / celebrity moves), NOT 'profitable smart money to follow directionally'. They do not rescue the smart-money-alpha hypothesis.
